content: [{'text': "I can see the robot has moved up slightly and appears to be entering the black wall area. I need to be careful. Looking at the map, the robot seems to be at the edge of the black wall. Let me check the pose and look more carefully at the map structure. The map shows horizontal corridors (white bands) separated by black walls. I need to find a vertical passage (gap in the black walls) to move between corridors.\n\nLooking at the image more carefully, the robot appears to be at the right edge of the middle black wall. The green destination is in the upper white corridor. Let me try moving forward a bit more to see if there's a passage through.", 'type': 'text'}, {'id': 'toolu_011rYEQHNVCjBYWv8F6jGdsx', 'caller': {'type': 'direct'}, 'input': {'distance_meters': 0.5}, 'name': 'move_forward', 'type': 'tool_use'}]
